title:

[PENTHOUSE GROOVE "PRISONER OF GROOVE" T-shirt]

A limited item created to celebrate the "PENTHOUSE GROOVE "PRISONER OF GROOVE" DJ Party" held at como es on 2026/05/01.

It will be available in limited quantities at the venue on the event day.

Just like the design of a record bound in chains, PENTHOUSE GROOVE will deliver a groove that captures your heart and never lets go.
